cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. So today must be July 28, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today. So if today is July 28, 2002, then one week ago would be July 21, 2002. Let me check the options. Looking at the options, (E) is 07/21/2002. But wait, let me make sure I didn't make a mistake. If tomorrow is July 29, today is July 28. Subtracting one week (7 days) from July 28 would be July 21. Yes, that's right because July has 31 days. So 28 minus 7 is 21. So the
